arm_grant_air_fighters = {
    # scout_plane — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = scout_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { scout_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_fighter_1914 — 1914

    if = {

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    # chemical_research — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = chemical_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { chemical_research = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = RON_Radioactive_Materials }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { RON_Radioactive_Materials = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_armor_ecm_2055 — 2055
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_armor_ecm_2055 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2055 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_armor_ecm_2055 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            NOT = { has_technology = antiair6_md }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { antiair6_md = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_artillery_md — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_artillery_md }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_artillery_md = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_artillery_md — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    }
    # sam_carrier7 — 2020

            NOT = { has_technology = sam_carrier7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis_x }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank_chassis_x = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_tank_chassis2 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_infantry_tank_chassis2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_infantry_tank_chassis2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis_a — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis_a = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monster_tank_chassis2 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monster_tank_chassis2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { monster_tank_chassis2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry = {

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_infantry_weapons_1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { early_infantry_weapons_1890 = 1 popup = no }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = ww1_NSB_armoured_car
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # dnc_armoured_car — 1899
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = dnc_armoured_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1899 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { dnc_armoured_car = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # NSB_dnc_armoured_car — 1899
    if = {
        limit = {

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # early_torpedo — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_moduleMTG_mines — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        set_technology = { ww1_moduleMTG_mines = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_transport — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mtg_transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
